mood: Trustworthy, Professional, Traditional Indian Bookkeeping (Bahi-Khata) meets Modern Fintech

spacing_and_layout.table_density: Dense. Use py-2 px-3 for table cells. Maintain tabular-nums for numeric columns.
spacing_and_layout.bento_dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6. Use 'Control Room' logic for dense metric summaries.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Use subtle 1px borders (border-border) with max 4px radius (rounded-sm) to retain the professional, ledger-like aesthetic.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: Minimalist. shadow-sm for cards, shadow-md for dropdowns/modals.

components.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select, and Datepicker. Ensure inputs have focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-primary. Include Hindi/Devanagari labels next to English (e.g., 'Gold (सोना)').
components.tables: Use Shadcn Table. Enable sticky headers if possible. Highlight Jama rows/amounts with green text/bg-tints and Naame with red text/bg-tints. Align numeric amounts to the right.
components.buttons: Primary buttons use the gold brand color (bg-[#C89E47] text-white). Hover state darkens. Add a subtle inner shadow.
components.tabs: Use Shadcn Tabs for toggling between 'Today\'s Hisab' and 'Party Ledger'. Use border-b styles instead of pill shapes for a more traditional look.
components.toast: Use Sonner for success/error alerts upon entry creation.

motion.tables: Staggered fade in for row entries.

icons.style: Duotone for dashboard widgets, Regular/Bold for dense table headers and actions.

login_background.description: Traditional Indian pattern. Use this as a split-screen background or low-opacity watermark on the login page to establish the cultural context of the jewellery business.

gold_texture_accent.description: Crumpled gold fabric texture. Can be used selectively as a textured header background or as a premium card background with a heavy white overlay (bg-white/90).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on the gold primary button passes APCA/WCAG. If not, use very dark gray (#1A1C19) text on the gold button.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All inputs, buttons, and table rows MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='submit-entry-button', data-testid='party-select').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a dual-user B2B bookkeeping app for 'Shree Gopaldas Vallabhdas Jewellers'.
Implement English + Hindi labels inline for familiarity (e.g. 'Party (पार्टी)').
Use Phosphor Icons for UI actions.
The UI should feel like a modern digital 'Bahi Khata' (Ledger). Use bone-white backgrounds, sharp or slightly rounded corners (rounded-sm), and strict grids.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for Headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text and tables (tabular-nums is strictly required for financial figures).
Differentiate Jama (Credit/In) and Naame (Debit/Out) clearly via color-coding: deep green for Jama, deep maroon for Naame.
Create an entry form that captures Date, Party Name, Item Name, Type, Gold, Fine Gold, Silver, Touch%, Amount, and Remarks.
Implement dense Shadcn tables for the ledger view with filters and export functionality.
